name: public_safety_near_miss_event_marrowbridge_rig_utl
premise: A drone-as-first-responder feed captured a domestic incident; privacy policy never contemplated livestreaming to supervisors. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety near miss event marrowbridge rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The trade is not abstract: it is rights versus utility under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Ravi Dubois
agents.identity: I am Ravi Dubois, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Nadia Navarro
agents.identity: I am Nadia Navarro, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if rights advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for utility.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Ravi Dubois must choose under rights versus utility. What does Ravi Dubois do?
